scenarios.title: Data Orchestration and Parallel Computing
scenarios.when_to_read: Hail genomic data processing, distributed Hail Query workflows, MatrixTable/Table/VDS pipelines, Hail Batch DAGs, hailctl cloud helpers, and scalable Python data compute over genomics datasets.
scenarios.role: Provides repo-specific guidance for Hail's Python APIs, Hailtop Batch DAGs, hailctl command families, and Hail backend setup/troubleshooting.
scenarios.read_when: User mentions Hail, hail, hailtop, hailctl, MatrixTable, VariantDataset, VDS, GVCF combiner, hl.init, Hail Batch, LocalBackend, ServiceBackend, VCF/PLINK/BGEN import, genomic QC, or Hail cloud execution.
scenarios.best_for: Using Hail Tables, dense MatrixTables, VDS/GVCF workflows, Hail Batch DAGs, hailctl config/auth/batch/dataproc/hdinsight commands, and diagnosing Hail setup/backend failures.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is about unrelated Hail monorepo service deployment, Kubernetes infrastructure, release automation, generic Spark without Hail, or non-genomic data systems not using Hail APIs.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `hail` when the request names Hail or its APIs/CLIs. Prefer Hail over generic data-orchestration skills for genomics MatrixTable/VDS workflows and over generic workflow tools for hailtop.batch or hailctl-specific behavior. If another Hail repo skill is present, prefer the one whose provenance commit matches the active checkout and whose generated id matches the user's requested skill.

scenarios.title: Dataset Processing, Evaluation, and Hub Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Genomic dataset loading, schema inspection, format conversion, VCF/Table/MatrixTable/VDS validation, sample/variant annotation, and Hail data layout troubleshooting.
scenarios.role: Covers Hail-specific genomic dataset import/export formats, schemas, row/column/entry axes, sparse VDS representation, and data validation/troubleshooting.
scenarios.read_when: User asks about VCF, PLINK, BGEN, GVCF, Table, MatrixTable, VariantDataset, contig recoding, reference genomes, local alleles, sample annotations, schema inspection, or Hail data import/export.
scenarios.best_for: Hail-specific genomic data processing, format conversion, schema/field troubleshooting, QC preparation, and self-contained recipe templates.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is only generic dataset loading/evaluation outside Hail or requires a different dataset/evaluation framework with no Hail APIs.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Use this scenario entry when the user's primary signal is data format/schema handling rather than backend orchestration; route inside the skill by Table vs MatrixTable vs VDS.
